greeting.message: Hello, you've reached Ben's Electric Solutions. How can I assist you today?

fallback.message: Sorry, I didn't quite understand that. Can you please rephrase?

transfer.message: I'm going to transfer you to Ben. Please hold for just a moment.

workingHours.message: Our working hours are Monday to Friday, 8:30 AM to 5:00 PM. We'll get back to you the next business day.

afterHours.message: We're currently closed. If you have an emergency, please call back and we'll do our best to assist you.
